answer:
The pizza has a diameter of 16 inches, so the radius is 8 inches. The topping area must be at least 75% of the total area, meaning the radius of the topping circle is \(\sqrt{0.75} \approx 0.866\) times the full radius, giving a topping radius of about 6.928 inches. The crust width is the difference between the full radius and the topping radius, which is \(8 - 6.928 \approx 1.072\) inches, closest to 1.1 inches.

\boxed{B}
